title: BleSecureFrame
description: AEAD-encrypted wrapper for every BLE message after the Challenge (06-security.md §6.5.3). The inner plaintext is the exact UTF-8 JSON bytes of one OSPP BLE message (OfflineAuthRequest, ServerSignedAuth, AuthResponse, Start/StopServiceRequest/Response, ServiceStatus, or the Receipt value). Sealed with ChaCha20-Poly1305 IETF (RFC 8439) under the appropriate directional key, nonce = 0x00000000 || U64BE(n), AAD = transcriptHash. This frame is the unit fragmented by ble-transport.md §11 (encrypt-then-fragment).

n.description: Per-direction frame counter (06-security.md §6.5.3 Pin 5). Starts at 0, increments by 1 per frame in this direction, and forms the AEAD nonce as 0x00000000 || U64BE(n). The receiver MUST verify n equals its next expected counter for the sender's direction; a mismatch is a replay/desync and MUST abort the session.

ct.description: Base64 of the ChaCha20-Poly1305-IETF sealed output (ciphertext followed by the 16-byte Poly1305 tag) over the inner message's UTF-8 JSON bytes, with AAD = transcriptHash (06-security.md §6.5 Pin 4).
